name: Radisson Mining Resources Inc.
summary: Radisson Mining Resources Inc., a gold exploration company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mining properties in Canada. The company has a portfolio of three properties, which covers an area of 7,361.42 hectares. Its flagship project is the O'Brien gold project that comprise 120 claims covering a total area of 5,838.94 hectares located in the Abitibi region, northwestern Qu√É¬©bec. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Rouyn-Noranda, Canada.
